stemHtml: Overhead the North Atlantic and overhead the Pacific west of America, what are the movements of hurricanes?

options.a: 5-10 degrees south, from west to east, turning in a southerly direction.
options.b: 10-15 degrees north, from east to west, turning in a northerly direction.
options.c: 20-25 degrees north, from east to west, turning in a northerly direction.
options.d: 5-10 degrees north, from west to east turning north-east.
